    "Engine timing marks misaligned by one tooth"
  ],

    "Disassemble timing drive components, realign crankshaft and camshaft timing marks to OEM specifications, and re-tension the belt or chain"

  "rationale": "A timing drive misaligned by even a single tooth is out of tolerance and can cause poor engine performance, diagnostic trouble codes, or catastrophic internal engine damage from valve-to-piston contact in interference engines.",
